prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年湖北省物理类最低录取位次分别为约 1107→1012→1063→5756→2890 名。2021–2023 年位次稳定在 1000–1100 名区间；2024 年因分两个专业组招生，其中（02）组位次大幅后移至 5756 名；2025 年合并为一个专业组后位次回升至 2890 名，较 2024 年明显前移，但较 2021–2023 年仍有约 1800 名的后移。近两年位次波动较大，2025 年基准位次约 2890 名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划：2021 年 10 人、2022 年 10 人、2023 年 9 人、2024 年 9 人、2025 年 10 人；2026 年计划增至 11 人，较 2025 年扩招 1 人（+10%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院依托浙江大学办学，浙江大学为 985/211/双一流高校，软科中国大学排名主榜第 3 名（2026 年），学校层次极高，对顶尖生源具有持续吸引力；2026 年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为「偏负面」，涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音综合热度排名第 14（高热），短视频平台曝光量大；历史投档异常记录中未见明显断档信号，整体报考关注度仍处高位；浙江大学临床医学获评 A 级、基础医学 A-、药学 A+、生物学 A，医学学科实力位居全国前列；2026 年招生专业包括临床医学（5+3 一体化）、临床医学（五年制）、医学试验班（巴德年医学班，八年医）及预防医学，均对应上述优势学科，学科竞争力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业在 2024–2026 年持续被评为「高热推荐」或「推荐」，社会报考热度高；口腔医学、护理等医学相关专业同样偏热。湖北省物理类考生数：2021 年 14.7 万→2022 年 20.2 万→2023 年 21.9 万→2024 年 24.5 万→2025 年 25.0 万，持续增长；2026 年全省总考生 39.37 万人，按近年物理类占比约 64.2% 估算，物理类考生约 25.3 万人，较 2025 年小幅增加约 1.2%，竞争略有加剧。省控线方面，湖北省物理类本科批 2025 年为 426 分，近年波动不大，未纳入主要判断；浙江大学医学院位于浙江省杭州市，属华东地区；湖北省距浙江较近，地域偏好对湖北考生报考无明显抑制。该校在湖北省招生人数较少（2025 年 10 人），属跨省招生，本地无特殊倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2890 名、2026 年扩招 10%（缓解竞争）、物理类考生小幅增加约 1.2%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、临床医学高热推荐（吸引高分生源）及浙大顶尖层次（持续吸引力）等多重因素，扩招与声誉负面对位次的后移作用略强于考生增加与医学热度对位次的前移作用，但学校层次支撑强劲，整体预计位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测 2026 年最低录取位次约 3033 名，位次区间为 2669–3397 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班；临床医学；八年医）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 3033 名，区间 2669–3397 名。位次在区间下限（2669 名）以内可重点冲刺一档的医学试验班（巴德年医学班）和临床医学（5+3一体化）；位次在区间中部（约 3033 名）建议以二档五年制临床医学为主攻方向；位次在区间上限（3397 名）附近可考虑三档预防医学保底。临床医学类专业整体热度高，报考竞争激烈，建议结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category in Hubei Province were approximately 1107, 1012, 1063, 5756, and 2890 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 1000–1100 range from 2021 to 2023; in 2024, due to enrollment in two major groups, the ranking for group (02) significantly dropped to 5756; in 2025, after merging into one major group, the ranking recovered to 2890, notably moving forward compared to 2024, but still about 1800 places behind the 2021–2023 levels. Rankings have fluctuated significantly in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2890 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province Physics Category: 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 10 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 11 students, an expansion of 1 student (+10%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competitive pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is affiliated with Zhejiang University, which is a 985/211/Double First-Class university, ranked 3rd in the main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026). The university's level is extremely high, maintaining a sustained attraction for top-tier students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative', involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signs of admission gaps are seen in historical admission anomaly records, and overall application attention remains high. Zhejiang University's clinical medicine is rated A-level, basic medicine A-, pharmacy A+, biology A, with medical disciplines ranking among the top nationally. In 2026, enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program), Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program), Medical Experimental Class (Bardeen Medical Class, Eight-Year Medical Program), and Preventive Medicine, all corresponding to the above advantageous disciplines, with strong disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Clinical Medicine major has been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' from 2024 to 2026, with high social application heat. Stomatology, Nursing, and other medical-related majors are also relatively popular. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province: 147,000 in 2021, 202,000 in 2022, 219,000 in 2023, 245,000 in 2024, and 250,000 in 2025, showing continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 393,700. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at approximately 64.2%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 253,000, a slight increase of about 1.2% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the Hubei Province Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years, not included as a main judgment factor. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, in the East China region. Hubei Province is relatively close to Zhejiang, so regional preference does not significantly suppress Hubei candidates' applications. The university enrolls a small number of students in Hubei Province (10 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no special local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 2890, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 10% (alleviating competition), a slight increase of about 1.2% in Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), a somewhat negative reputation (slight suppression), high heat recommendation for Clinical Medicine (attracting high-scoring students), and Zhejiang University's top-tier level (sustained attraction), the ranking-lowering effect of expansion and negative reputation slightly outweighs the ranking-raising effect of candidate increase and medical popularity, but the strong support from the university level is significant. Overall, the ranking is expected to slightly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 3033, with a ranking range of 2669–3397.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Bardeen Medical Class; Clinical Medicine; Eight-Year Medical Program)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3033, range 2669–3397. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound of the range (2669) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Medical Experimental Class (Bardeen Medical Class) and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program); those with rankings around the middle of the range (approximately 3033) are advised to target Tier 2 Five-Year Clinical Medicine as the main direction; candidates near the upper bound of the range (3397) may consider Tier 3 Preventive Medicine as a safety option. Clinical medicine majors overall have high popularity and intense competition, so it is recommended to position oneself reasonably based on one's own ranking.
